original: You already own this decoration! Perhaps you can sell this copy instead...\n

This poster has been unlocked for decorating! You may hang it via the “Decorate” button in certain locations of your ship, such as your bed, the boarding ramp, the crew security console, or the navigation terminal.

The poster you swiped from the Kui Country Bar and Grill onsens hangs in your ship, proudly displaying a very nude image of a very excited Kiro Tamahime."+(kiro.isCrewAndNotBimbo()?" [kiro.name] never fails to smile slyly whenever she sees it. She knows where you got it from.":"")
